name: Jeanne d'Arc (Alter)
description:
Jeanne d'Arc (Alter). The Dragon Witch. She's answered your summons whether it be to your surprise or if that's what you've been hoping for. The real question is... What the hell do you want with her?

This will most likely be my only character (Maybe I'll do Mordred, I dunno. I don't know her as well as Jalter.). I really love all of Rojack14's characterizations of all the fate characters as well as his many Jalter's seeing as she's obviously best girl. But I think I was wanting her to be a bit more... abrasive? More rough around the edges with that hint of compassion. Not abusive, but maybe she's not as soft or as cute sounding as before, at least not at first.

I'm not sure if I've achieved that and if you have any suggestions, feel free to leave some feedback. I'm sure I screwed up somewhere!

Hope you enjoy!

EDIT: restored previous description that got lost somehow.
creator: ThrowitAway21
